nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 湿地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括鵲鵝、澳洲硬尾鸭、黑天鹅等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 秧鸡科
nodes.summary: 秧鸡科（Rallidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Tsingy forest rail、Madagascar forest rail、Chestnut forest rail等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联97种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等97种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

nodes.name: American coot
nodes.summary: American coot（American coot，学名 Fulica americana），分类上属于鹤形目，并归入秧鸡科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于湿地、北美洲，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Unlike the webbed feet of ducks, coots have broad, lobed scales on their lower legs and toes that fold back with each step to facilitate walking on dry land. Coots live near water, typically inhabiting wetlands and open water bodies in North America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Unlike the webbed feet of ducks, coots have broad, lobed scales on their lower legs and toes that fold back with each step to facilitate walking on dry land. Coots live near water, typically inhabiting wetlands and open water bodies in North America

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Unlike the webbed feet of ducks, coots have broad, lobed scales on their lower legs and toes that fold back with each step to facilitate walking on dry land. Coots live near water, typically inhabiting wetlands and open water bodies in North America

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|The American coot is regularly found in sizable flocks. American coots are found near water reed-ringed lakes and ponds, open marshes, and sluggish rivers
